mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC falls below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.3pp, or the signal loses predictive power during non-recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and business demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint increases in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60-day returns, or the interaction term shows negative coefficient in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening supply-side capacity and corporate output growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days during economic expansions.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration predicts negative or flat 20-day returns during expansion phases, or the mechanism reverses direction when GDP growth exceeds 3.5% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above 2.5% annually forces markets to price in tighter monetary policy and erodes real corporate margins, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5% YoY, or the signal shows zero predictive accuracy in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and rising household income, which supports corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no statistically significant positive correlation with 60-day forward returns over a 5-year rolling window, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between real GDP growth and real personal consumption expenditures signals shifting demand composition toward business investment, which amplifies equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-RSAFS spread fails to predict 20-day returns, or the interaction effect turns negative when consumer spending decelerates by more than 0.5% quarter-over-quarter.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating industrial production during peak economic cycles indicates supply bottlenecks and impending demand destruction, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO deceleration predicts positive 5-day returns during late-cycle peaks, or the signal loses significance when inventory-to-sales ratios remain below 1.2.
